title: leonia glycycarpa var. racemosa
intro: Leonia glycycarpa var. racemosa, also known as the white panax or white leonia, is a plant species that belongs to the family Celastraceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Leonia glycycarpa var. racemosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to protect against infections and oxidative stress. Leonia glycycarpa var. racemosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
